prompt: A bold anime pop-art poster of a tall white-haired male sorcerer in a dark navy high-collar coat, shown from the waist up, facing forward in a confident pose with his left hand raised close to the camera making a peace sign. His face is partially obscured by a rectangular blur/censor block centered over the eyes and nose area, while his spiky silver-white hair fans outward dramatically above a dark blindfold or visor. Place a huge comic speech bubble across the top with the exact text LUDDITES ALWAYS LOSE! in heavy black all-caps sans-serif lettering. Use a vivid blue background filled with dense red and orange radial speed lines exploding outward from behind the character, creating a dynamic manga cover feel. Emphasize thick ink outlines, cel-shaded anime rendering, posterized contrast, and a slightly warped vintage-comic print look. The composition should be vertical, tightly cropped, high energy, rebellious, graphic, and meme-like, with the silver white hair, dark navy coat, and bright blue with red-orange radial lines dominating the palette.
